svg.title: Bag Cradle — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
svg.text: Material: PETG | Qty: 2 | Third-Angle Projection | Scale noted per view
Coordinate origin: exterior front-left-bottom corner | X=width, Y=length, Z=height
Scale: 8 px/mm | Section X-Z at Y=100
Scale: 8 px/mm | Section X-Z at Y=350
1. Interior fillet radius: 3.0 mm at all floor-to-wall junctions
2. Sidewall draft angle: 3 deg outward (top wider than base)
3. Spout notch: 1.0 mm chamfer on top edge
4. Tab barb: 45 deg lead-in chamfer, 90 deg retention face
5. Two barb detents per tab: at Y=100 (20mm long) and Y=280 (20mm long)
7. Clip arc: 270 deg (90 deg opening faces -Z)
